active_changes: gpg-agent SSH support disabled to fix systemd ordering cycle
nvidia sync mode with GSP disabled (NVreg_EnableGpuFirmware=0) — more stable on Legion hybrid
nvidia DynamicPowerManagement removed — no effect in sync mode
legion-kb-rgb patched for Legion 5 Pro report descriptor (191 vs 959)
Copilot key remapped to rightcontrol via keyd (was rightctrl — invalid key name)
Advanced BIOS GRUB entry uses search --file instead of @bootRoot@
known_issues: nvidia-persistenced may fail on first switch after kernel param changes — resolves on reboot
nvidia-temp-limit cascades from persistenced — resolves on reboot
CDI generator cascades from NVML unavailability — resolves on reboot
/etc/resolv.conf stale regular file from openresolv — symlink creation fails, NM+DNS still work
